name: Salt Water Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, salt, and water in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook slowly, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
3. Continue cooking to the hard ball stage (260°F) without stirring.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Pour into a buttered 15x10x1-inch pan.
6. Allow to cool until comfortable to handle.
7. Butter hands and gather taffy into a ball.
8. Pull gently, stretching the candy until it is light in color and becomes harder to pull.
9. Cut each piece into fourths if desired.
10. Pull each piece into long strands about 1/2 inch thick.
11. Using buttered scissors, quickly snip the strands into bite-sized pieces.
12. Wrap each piece individually in waxed paper.
